name: Ryan Anderson
title: CEO, Sojourn Hospitality, Inc
text: Team BeeBee has been a tremendous asset for our organization. Their communication is excellent, they always deliver on time and apply a strong critical eye to all their work. They have guided us in many areas of our bookkeeping and accounting and have vastly improved our overall systems over the last few years. Raghav is a top-notch consultant, and we recommend him to anyone considering working with him.

name: Brian Burt
title: Founder and CEO, MaestroConference Inc.
text: Topnotch accountants and ad-hoc analysis, and the best cash flow projections we've ever had by far I've worked with (hired) roughly a dozen accounting firms and accountants, and having worked with BeeBee for over 5 years now it's definitely the one I recommend to my friends seeking.

name: Angela McCrory
title: Angela McCrory LLC
text: BeeBee Advisory has been a pleasure to work with - responsive and timely, they swiftly put together accounting for our US-based real estate business, giving useful feedback and recommendations along the way.

name: Clay Bethune
title: President, 391 Financials
text: Beebee Advisory was added to our team almost 5 years ago. Their insights, modeling and oversight of our finances has been invaluable in our company's growth. We look forward to having Beebee Advisory help us in the future as we continue to reach new milestones.

name: Shaun Davy
title: Director - Ana Tree Lodges Ltd. & Director - Afritec Asset Management
text: Bee Bee advisory have been a great company to work with, they provide a considered and careful approach to work while also ensuring they get what they need to do done. For us they have provided a great way to ensure our Xero accounts are correctly reconciled as well as providing a extra level of scrutiny.

name: Robert Andrews
title: CFO, Engage3 Holdings, Inc.
text: I am pleased to express my sincere thanks for all that Beebee Advisory does for their clients. I have known this firm for roughly 4 years and they consistently provide timely and quality financial services, from routine accounting tasks to month end close support to more complex multi-company consolidations and financial modeling. I highly recommend you utilize these talented individuals who will exceed your expectations regardless of the complexity of the tasks, large or small and regardless of what time zone you function.

name: Jad Hammoud
title: NK Consulting (Conversion Stack)
text: Team BeeBee is absolutely fantastic to work with. They have a depth of understanding on everything from revenue recognition to growth planning and investment management. In addition to getting our books and finances under control - they put in place processes and procedures that have saved us a ton of time and given us so much visibility into the business. I can't recommend them enough.

name: Shaun Davy
title: Director - Ana Tree Lodges Ltd. & Director - Afritec Asset Management
text: Bee Bee advisory have been a great company to work with, they provide a considered and careful approach to work while also ensuring they get what they need to do done.
